## Summary

<!-- What outcome does this change deliver? -->

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] Documentation and tests cover behavior changes

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] No credentials, live invitation links, local profiles, databases, Terraform state, or production data are included
- [ ] Trust-boundary, protocol, deployment, or backward-compatibility effects are documented
